query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN richSummaryJson IS NOT NULL AND richSummaryJson != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_rich_summary, SUM(CASE WHEN wikipediaUrl IS NOT NULL AND wikipediaUrl != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_wikipedia FROM book_profiles;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 46FBtXPMNF6LwZ8.root --database ehSrGoKN2NYhXg8UYLtWGw --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN richSummaryJson IS NOT NULL AND richSummaryJson != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_rich_summary, SUM(CASE WHEN wikipediaUrl IS NOT NULL AND wikipediaUrl != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_wikipedia FROM book_profiles;
